title: Dick Turpin
writer: Charles Darnton, Charles Kenyon, Donald W. Lee
actors: Tom Mix, Alan Hale, Kathleen Myers
plot: Dick Turpin, an English highwayman who robs from the rich and gives to the poor, holds up the coach of Lord Churlton. Sometime later, in aiding a coach attacked by ruffians, Dick meets aristocratic Alice Brookfield, who is being f...
